event_info: short of a good length and just outside off - a hint of away swing and it's steered with an open face; behind square on the off-side for a single
on a good length and just outside off - Gill stays on the back-foot as he drove it to cover-point
fraction fuller and just outside off - Gill leans across and drives it to the left of mid-on for a single
edged and four; on a good length and shaping away from off; draws Sudharsan into the drive and finds the drive; finds the edge and it bounces wide of Hazlewood at short third
on a good length and around the off-stump channel; Sai Sudharsan leans across defensively
tad fuller and just outside off - Sai Sudharsan plays with soft hands and drops it in front of cover; off for a quick single
appeal for LBW; but it did look high; nipped back froma length and caught Sai Sudharsan in the crease; he played all around and is struck high on the thigh-pad. Pitched outside leg as well
short of a good length and pushed across the left-hander - Sai Sudharsan throws his hands on the cut and misses
banged in short and at the stumps - Sai Sudharsan swivels across and miscues the pull; behind square on the on-side for a couple of runs
fuller length delivery and slipping down leg; Sai Sudharsan was shaping to flick and missed; called as a wide
short of a good length and angling across the left-hander; extra bounce and Sai Sudharsan is beaten on the back-foot cut
on a good length and just outside off - catches Sai Sudharsan's inside edge on the drive; the bottom-hand comes off as it rolls back to the bowler
1 run; short of a good length and on the hips; Sai Sudharsan was looking to flick and missed; off the thigh-pad and rolled to the on-side
nicely played; short of a good length and just outside off - Sai Sudharsan waits on it; opens the face of the bat and then runs it in the gap between slip and short third
on a good length and at the stumps; tucked off the back-foot to the on-side
Bhuvneshwar shortens the length on middle; Sai Sudharsan prods across and turns it to the on-side
lovely; back of a length and just outside off - Sai Sudharsan stands tall and then punches it in front of square on the off-side; beats the fielder in the ring and raced away
on a good length and just outside off; hit high on the bat as came down the pitch on the push
length ball at the pads; clipped behind square on the on-side for a single
fuller length delivery outside off; driven on the rise and straight to the fielder at mid-off
hacked; short ofd a good length and just outside off - Sai Sudharsan swivels across on the pull; the bottom-hand came off; but he adjusts to the lower bounce and thumps it through mid-wicket
cracking shot; width on offer from Rasikh and Sudharsan doesn't miss out - gets on top of the bounce and crunches the cut past point; beats David's dive in the deep
too short and too wide from Rasikh - cut away behind square on the off-side for a single
short of a good length and just outside off - nudged behind square on the off-side for a single
fuller length delivery outside off - driven off the outside half; into the gap past point for a single

cheeky and four; short of a good length and just outside off - Sudharsan shuffles right across on the lap; gets an inside edge and beats the wrong-footed Jitesh Sharma; past jis dive to his right and runs away
short of a good length and slanting across the left-hander; Sudharsan runs down the pitch on the swipe and missed
banged in short and into the pitch - Sudharsan is a tad late on the pull and the ball rolls off the bottom-edge
short; wide and six; width on offer and Sai Sudharsan doesn't miss out - rides the bounce and then cuts it high over backward point; sailed into the stands for a maximum
on a good length and at the stumps - Sai Sudharsan prods across and defends it to the on-side
cracking shot; back of a length and angling across the left-hander - Sai Sudharsan backs away and then cuts it late; beats point and runs away to the ropes. 14 off the over
short of a good length and just outside off; defended to the off-side
back of a length delivery and Gill pulls over mid-wicket for a couple of runs
shimmies down the wicket and flat-bats this over mid-on for a boundary
on a good length and at the stumps; Gill runs down the pitch and mistimes the shovel; wide of mid-on for a single
nicely played; back of a length and well wide of off - Sai Sudharsan plays late and then slices it backward of square on the off-side; runs away to the ropes in a hurry
slower ball on off; Sai Sudharsan drops it in front of backward point and is off for a quick single - another expensive over from Rasikh; 12 came off it
flighted delivery outside off - muscled away off the back-foot to long-on
tossed up and sliding into the pads; clipped in front of square on the on-side for a single
the bouncer from Krunal; it isn't too high though and it's swatted past square leg for a single
Krunal tosses one slower and just outside off - a push-drive straight to the fielder at cover
tossed up and sliding into the right-hander; nudged wide of mid-wicket for a single
flatter and quicker of off; was bowled with a lower-arm trajectory - Sai Sudharsan was shaping to cut and missed
back of a length and just outside off - Gill gets on top of the bounce and steers it behind square on the off-side

cheeky and six; on a good length and just outside off - Sai Sudharsan shuffles across; gets under the ball and then uses Shepherd's pace and to paddle it over long leg; brings up the 2nd half-century of the season
crisp; fuller length delivery and well wide of off - Sai Sudharsan leans into the drive and then finds the gap wide of cover; runs away across the fast outfield
short of a good length and just outside off - dabbed down to third man for a single

hammered; this is an expensive over from Shepherd - short of a good length and just outside off; Gill stays on the front-foot and then plays the half-arm jab; into the gap wide of long-on for a boundary
on a good length and just outside off - punched in front of square on the off-side for a single; 17 off the over
tossed up on off; worked down to long-on for a single
slower and down leg; past the left-hander and has been wided
cracking shot; the bouncer from Krunal; but Sai Sudharsan was ready for it; gets on top of the bounce and then plays a one-handed cut; high and over backward point for a maximum
fraction short and at the stumps; pulled through mid-wicket for a single
tossed up and drifting onto the pads; nudged behind square on the on-side for a single
flatter and quicker of off; was bowled with a lower trajectory and Sai Sudharsan is beaten on the cut

lovely; Krunal tosses one just outside off - tad too full though and allows Sai Sudharsan to get under it on the slog-sweep; high and over the ropes at mid-wicket. Another expensive over for RCB; 16 came off it
flighted delivery outside off; punched square on the off-side for a single
tossed up on middle; nudged into the leg-side for a single
Suyash attempts the wrong 'un and slides it well down leg; called as a wide
flighted delivery on off; pushed down to long-on for a single
Suyash tosses one just outside off - driven square on the off-side for a single
flighted delivery on middle; worked down to long-on for a single
nicely played; pushed through quicker and down leg - Sai Sudharsan gets down low; uses the angle and then sweeps it behind square on the on-side for a boundary
that's a huge six! Shubman Gill goes down on his knee and slogsweeps this over deep backward square leg for a towering six. Both the openers having a great time out in the middle
dragged towards the leg-side by Shubman Gill
nudged through mid-wicket by Sai Sudharsan for a single
width on offer outside off; Shubman Gill cuts it through the off-side for a single
darted on a good length; Sai Sudharsan clips it through the on-side for a couple of runs
nudged towards the on-side by Sai Sudharsan for one
that's a good stop by Patidar at cover. Sai Sudharsan drives the slower delivery towards cover where the RCB captain stops it with a dive to his right
on the shorter side; Shubman Gill pulls it through the on-side for a single
low full toss outside off; Sai Sudharsan drives it towards cover
131.8kph; pitched up by the bowler around off; driven to long-off by Sai Sudharsan
low full toss; right into the blockhole as Shubman Gill squeezes it to long-on
slower delivery outside off; driven through covers for a single
googly goes the distance. Sai Sudharsan picks it nice and early; leans forward and lofts it over long-off with high elbows. Sweet shot..

smashed back to the bowler! Suyash Sharma tries to grab a return catch; but he gets hit on the hand. He is in pain and the physio is out to have a check on him. It's his middle finger of the left hand that looks bruised. We'll have a slight delay. Meanwhile; Kohli and Gill are having a friendly chat. Both having smiles on their face
short and wide outside off; it's a googly that has been punched through cover for one

ball_event: out Caught by Devdutt Padikkal!! First loud cheer from the Chinnaswamy crowd since the match started. Finally a wicket for RCB. This was a googly on the shorter side
event_info: and Shubman Gill tried to take him on. Goes for the aerial route; but doesn't get the timing right. A straightforward catch for Padikkal and Shubman Gill departs after playing a handy knock. Could have probably played at a better strike rate for the number of deliveries he used up. Shubman Gill c Devdutt Padikkal b Suyash Sharma 32(24) [4s-2 6s-1]
2 runs; that's a googly on leg; Buttler tries to nudge it away; clips his pads and rolls towards short fine leg. A couple of leg byes taken
touch short on leg; nudged away for a single by Jos Buttler
pushed towards mid-on with soft hands as they manage to come back for two
pitched up by the bowler as Jos Buttler drives this towards mid-on for another single
juicy full toss on the pads; Sai Sudharsan whips it away to the deep mid-wicket fence as the ball almost goes the distance. Just landed in front of the cushions and beat the fielder sprinting across
short and wide outside off; Sai Sudharsan hops a touch and slaps it over point
on a length around middle and leg; knocked to long-on
Bhuvneshwar Kumar goes full outside off and Sai Sudharsan drives it through the off-side for one
fraction short outside off; skids along the deck as Sai Sudharsan slices it towards point. Moves to 99*
he has been too short today. Jos Buttler picks the length early; rocks back in the crease and hammers this through covers all along the floor. No chance of stopping that as it was absolutely belted
advances down the wicket and flicks this through the on-side for one

first century of IPL 2026 for Sudharsan! He continues to have a fine record against the Royal Challengers. This was short and wide outside off and Sai Sudharsan slapped it through the off-side for a single. Gets a standing ovation from the GT supporters and his teammates in the dugout. Has been a classy knock by the opener
more runs! Suyash Sharma with the googly; right into the slot; Jos Buttler picks the bones out of it; clubbing it over wide long-on for one of the biggest maximums of the evening so far..
flatter through the air on leg; clipped through the leg-side by Jos Buttler for a single
full and wide outside off; Jos Buttler square drives it through point for a rollicking boundary
steered into the off-side for a single

ball_event: out Caught&Bowled!! Josh Hazlewood gets the set batsman. This was a short and quick ball around off
event_info: Sai Sudharsan goes for a pull; mistimes it completely and the ball flies straight to Josh Hazlewood. He takes a safe catch in his followthrough and the opener departs after smashing a fine century. Both the GT openers are gone; but they have enough firepower to follow next. A score of 200 is likely on the cards. Sai Sudharsan c and b Josh Hazlewood 100(58) [4s-11 6s-5]
good length delivery around middle and leg; Washington Sundar clips it into the on-side

that's a massive six! Pitched up by the bowler around middle and leg; Washington Sundar flicks it over deep mid-wicket for a towering six. That was some shot to open his account; went way back into the stands

15 runs and a wicket in that over. Back of a length delivery outside off; Washington Sundar plays it on the rise; carving it away through backward point. Tim David sprints across to his right and tries to grab it; misses it though; resulting in a boundary
tad short on middle and leg; clipped through mid-wicket for a single
clipped through the on-side for a single by Washington Sundar
flicked towards wide long-on by Jos Buttler for a single
googly outside off; pushed into the off-side with soft hands by Washington Sundar
wrong 'un around off; Washington Sundar bunts it to long-off for a single
only 4 runs from that over. Crucial over by Suyash Sharma. Especially against Buttler. This was a short and wide delivery outside off; Jos Buttler slapped it to cover where Patidar stopped it
steered towards point for a single by Washington Sundar
a toe-crushing yorker by Bhuvneshwar Kumar; Jos Buttler somehow manages to squeeze it towards point for one
pulls this short ball through mid-wicket for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Josh Hazlewood!! Low full toss around off
event_info: Jos Buttler tries to be cheeky and plays the reverse scoop; but it flies straight to Hazlewood at short third man. He takes a sharp catch inside the circle; and the dangerous batter is gone with more than 2 overs remaining. That can make a big difference in the final score. Buttler has the ability to play those big shots; and it hasn't been easy for new batters to play on this particular wicket. Jos Buttler c Josh Hazlewood b Bhuvneshwar Kumar 25(16) [4s-2 6s-1]
squeezed into the off-side by Jason Holder for a single
pulls this short ball towards deep square square for one
yorker length ball as Washington Sundar drills it past the bowler for one
flicked through the leg-side by Jason Holder for a couple of runs
banged in short by Josh Hazlewood; Jason Holder swings and misses; gets beaten due to the pace and bounce
misfield results in the second. This was a full toss on off and Jason Holder drove it towards cover; where Patidar misfields
low full toss on off; driven to long-off for a single
french cuts this towards short fine leg; where a misfield by Bhuvi results in two runs. Sloppy effort by RCB fielders in that over
190 up for GT. A length delivery with a slingy action. Jason Holder picks the bones out of it; smoking it over long-on for a 84m maximum
executes the wide yorker; Jason Holder leaves it
smoked into the stands! Tossed up delivery; right into the slot; Jason Holder goes down on his knee and swings it over deep mid-wicket for six more. That's the second maximum of the over
200 up for GT! A full toss outside off; Jason Holder reaches out for it and smashes it towards wide long-off. Padikkal in the deep tries his best to stop it; but the ball eventually finds the fence
that's a bouncer by Krunal Pandya finally. Jason Holder pulls it on the bounce to deep mid-wicket
GT finish with 205/3! A full toss to end the innings as Washington Sundar whips it towards long-on for one
on a good length and just outside off; driven straight to the fielder at mid-off
short of a good length and at the hips; tucked behind square on the on-side

a sitter and Sundar has dropped it; on a good length and angling into the pads; Virat Kohli was early into the flick and the ball popped up in the air; straight to the man at mid-wicket; in and out of Sundar's grasp
tad too full and at the stumps; nudged into the gap wide of mid-wicket for a couple of runs
back of a length and just outside off; dabbed in front of square on the off-side for a single
1 run; short of a good length and at the hips; tucked off the thigh-pad for a leg-bye
streaky and four; KG shortens the length and gets it to nip back into the left-hander; catches Bethell's inside edge and flies wide of the diving keeper
short of a good length and just outside off; defended off the back-foot to the off-side
on a good length and pushed across the left-hander - Bethell plays away from his body and the thick edge flies behind square on the off-side
clubbed; back of a length and at the stumps - Kohli backs away; opens up his body and then hammers it over mid-on; almost went all the way; bouncing in front of the ropes
short of a good length and well wide of off; Kohli plays away from his body on the steer and is undone by KG's extra bounce
1 run; short of a good length and angling back into the right-hander - catches Kohli in the crease and thuds high into the thigh-pad; rolls to the off-side
on a good length and just outside off; driven in front of square on the off-side for a couple
short of a good length and just outside off; dropped with soft hands to the off-side for a quick single
lovely; short and just outside off - Bethell makes room by backing away and then clatters the cut square past point; no need to run for those
short of a good length and at the stumps; Bethell presses across and gets an under-edge onto his feet
on a good length and at the stumps; Bethell backs away and gets enough on the shovel to clear mid-wicket; bounces away to the ropes

ball_event: out Caught by Shahrukh Khan!! Caught at cover-point - a sharp catch and RCB have lost their opening wicket. On a good length and angling across the left-hander
event_info: Bethell backs away and then looks to elevate the drive over the off-side; but he doesn't get the placement right and Shahrukh completes a fine catch. Jacob Bethell c Shahrukh Khan b Mohammed Siraj 14(10) [4s-3]
lovely; full and at the pads; whipped away in front of square on the on-side; races away to the ropes in a hurry
short of a good length and just outside off; dabbed with soft hands to the off-side
beautifully played; too full and at the pads; Padikkal lets the ball come and then whips it off the pads; high and over deep backward square leg for a maximum
short of a good length and just outside leg; nudged behind square on the on-side for a single
back of a length and just outside off; dabbed behind square on the off-side for a single
short of a good length and just outside off; dabbed behind square on the off-side
that's easy pickings; too straight from Siraj; on the pads and DDP flicks it fine; runs away fine and onto the ropes
short of a good length and just outside off; DDP hops across and dabs it to the off-side
tad fuller and at the stumps; defended back at the bowler
back of a length and angling across the left-hander; DDP looks to dab and misses
back of a length and angling across the left-hander - DDP swipes across the line and misses
crunched; on a good length and just outside off - DDP bends down onto his knee and then creams the drive over cover; sails over the ropes for a maxmum
off an inside edge behind the wickets
pulled through mid-wicket by Padikkal for a single
pulled over mid-wicket for a boundary by Kohli. Was a slower one and he read it to perfection; putting away to the fence
defended down the pitch
flicked through mid-wicket for a single
off an inside edge towards square leg for a single
at the hips; clipped to fine leg for a single
fraction short as Kohli pulls it through square leg for a couple of runs; good running between the wickets
short and punished! Plays it on the rise and thumps this short ball over covers for a boundary
Kohli advances down the wicket and carves this short ball over backward point for four runs
fraction short on off; slapped to mid-off by Kohli
pulls the short ball towards the on-side for a single
fraction short outside off; cut towards point
50-run stand up! This was on the shorter side; Kohli rocks back and pummels it over wide long-on for a maximum
tad short outside off; Kohli picks the length early and punches it through covers for four more
googly by Rashid as Kohli nudges it towards mid-wicket for one
dragged through square leg by Padikkal
nudged towards mid-wicket for a single. 13 runs from Rashid's over
short ball outside off; Kohli plays it on the rise; carving it over point for a single
off an inside edge and the hips as the ball rolls towards fine leg for a boundary
short and punished! Padikkal rocks back in the crease and pulls it over fine leg for half-a-dozen
yet another short ball on leg; Padikkal pulls it towards deep backward square leg on the bounce
back of a length around off; chipped towards mid-off for a single
100 up for RCB. Pitched up by the bowler around off; Padikkal lofts it over long-off for half-a-dozen
short ball on middle and leg; pulled through square leg
goes for a drive; gets beaten. Was that a chance? If it was; Buttler puts it down

cracking shot; the wrong 'un from Rashid; but it's a tad too full and just outside off - Padikkal leans forward and then goes inside out over extra-cover; sails all the way over the ropes for a maximum
Rashid pushes one full and down leg; left alone and it's called as a wide
lovely; a 20-ball half-century for Padikkal - flighted delivery and drifting downb leg; Padikkal sinks low and then plays the pick-up sweep; high and over deep backward square leg for a maximum
flighted delivery on middle and leg; clipped behind square on the on-side for a single
slower and just outside off - Kohli backs away and chops it down to long-off
a fifty for Kohli as well ; works one into the gap wide of mid-wicket for a single - Chinnaswamy roars as their favourite star raises his bat
on a good length and just outside off - Padikkal backs away and drills the drive to long-off
banged in short and at the stumps - Kohli swivels across on the pull and missed
nicely played; fuller length delivery on the pads; whipped behind square on the on-side; couple of bounces and over the ropes
smashed; this is sensational from Virat Kohli - too full from Rabada; Kohli leans across; brings his wrists into play and those are powerful wrists; drills it into the stands at wide mid-wicket
short of a good length and just outside off - Kohli backs away and cuts it square on the off-side for a single
short and just outside off - Kohli stands tall and then plays the half-arm jab; through mid-wicket for a single
Holder shortens the length and pushes one across the left-hander - Padikkal swivels across and misses
banged in short and just outside off - Padikkal gets on top of the bounce and pulls it behind square on the on-side for a single
very full from Holder; right into the blockhole and Kohli squeezes it to the on-side
on a length and angling into the pads; clipped past square leg for a single
appeal for a caught behind; full and at the pads; Padikkal was looking to flick and missed; brushed the thigh-pad and that's the sound that Buttler heard
tossed up delivery around off; Virat Kohli stands tall and thumps it towards long-off. Beats the fielder sprinting across. Krishna tried his best; but this was played straighter by Kohli
loopy delivery around off; driven towards wide long-off by Virat Kohli for a single
played through mid-wicket by Devdutt Padikkal for a single; was a gentle nudge by the batter
fraction short on off; punched along the carpet to long-off

ball_event: out Bowled!! Rashid Khan with an important wicket. Was a googly around off
event_info: Devdutt Padikkal advances down the wicket and has a go at it. Goes for the lofted drive; misses it altogether and the ball clips the stumps on its way to Buttler. End of a fine knock by Devdutt Padikkal. Has played an impactful knock for the defending champions. Devdutt Padikkal b Rashid Khan 55(27) [4s-2 6s-6]
googly on off; Rajat Patidar knocks it into the off-side
fired down the leg-side by Jason Holder; that's a wide ball
fraction short around off; Virat Kohli rides the bounce; knocking it back to the bowler

that has gone way back into the stands! Virat Kohli steps out of his crease and smokes this length delivery over deep mid-wicket for a towering six. High and handsome as the crowd at Chinnaswamy absolutely loves it
150 up for RCB! On a length around off; Virat Kohli stands tall and lofts it over long-off as the ball goes the distance. Just cleared the boundary. Back-to-back sixes

ball_event: out Bowled!! End of a fine knock by Kohli. Was dropped when he was on zero
event_info: walks back after making a significant contribution. This was a slower delivery on the shorter side around off; Virat Kohli goes for a pull and the inside edge has smashed into the stumps. Holder is pumped up; while Kohli is disappointed. Was looking in sublime touch. He walks back to a standing ovation from everyone present at the venue. Virat Kohli b Jason Holder 81(44) [4s-8 6s-4]
back of a length around off; Jitesh Sharma guides it back to the bowler
17 runs from the over. Smashes this down the ground for a boundary to open his account does Jitesh Sharma. Gets going in style as an expensive over comes to an end
tossed up delivery around off; Rajat Patidar gets going with a six over long-off. Shahrukh Khan in the deep leaps; but fails to grab it
googly by the bowler; Rajat Patidar heaves it over mid-wicket for a single
googly by the bowler around off; Jitesh Sharma knocks it into the off-side
Jitesh Sharma has smoked this one into the stands. Advances down the wicket and lofts it over long-off for half-a-dozen. Clears the boundary comfotably
loopy delivery outside off; sharp turn there as Jitesh Sharma gets beaten on the outside edge

ball_event: out Caught by Manav Suthar!! Jitesh Sharma's short little cameo comes to an end. Rashid Khan ends his spell with a wicket to his name. This was tad short outside off
event_info: Jitesh Sharma rocks back in the crease and punches it uppishly to cover. A sharp catch taken by Manav Suthar and RCB are four down. Is there a twist in the tale? Jitesh Sharma c Manav Suthar b Rashid Khan 10(6) [4s-1 6s-1]
played through the off-side by Rajat Patidar for a single
sharp grip and turn; Tim David punches it through the off-side for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Washington Sundar!! This is proving to be an interesting run chase. They are scoring runs
event_info: but are losing wickets at the same time. A tossed up delivery by Manav Suthar; Rajat Patidar clears his front leg and looks to take him on. Miscues it completely towards extra cover as Washington Sundar calls for it and completes a good catch moving backward. The required run rate is around the 7-run mark. Rajat Patidar c Washington Sundar b Manav Suthar 8(5) [6s-1]
nudged through the leg-side for a single
tad short around off; punched into the off-side by Tim David
fraction short outside off; Tim David carves it through the off-side for one
short of a length outside off; steered to third man
tad short outside off; Krunal Pandya runs it down to third man
short and quick on leg; Tim David swings across the line; doesn't middle it though
short and quick outside off; Tim David has a swing and a miss. Proving to be a fine over by Kagiso Rabada. The required run rate is inching closer to the 9-run mark
goes short again; but this one is over the batter's head; called a wide by the umpire

straight up and it has flown over the boundary. A good length delivery around off; Tim David has a wild swing the the top edge clears the fielder at third man. Much needed six for RCB as the required run rate drops significantly
short and quick outside off; skids along the deck; Tim David has a poke at it; gets beaten
down to run-a-ball almost. A tossed up delivery by Manav Suthar; Krunal Pandya stands tall and lofts it over the bowler for a boundary
back-to-back boundaries. A tossed up delivery outside off; Krunal Pandya goes down on his knee and fetches it from outside off; nails the slogsweep and finds the boundary at deep mid-wicket
full and wide outside off; Krunal Pandya reaches out for it by leaning forward; mistimes it into the off-side
yorker length ball on leg; Krunal Pandya looks to flick it away; doesn't make contact though; off the pads towards the bowler

that shot should seal the deal. This is why they don't use left-arm finger spinners against left-handed batters. Krunal Pandya has made the most of that opportunity. This was a flatter delivery around off and Krunal Pandya clubbed it over deep mid-wicket for half-a-dozen
squeezed towards mid-wicket for a single only 7 runs required in 12 balls
short ball outside off; good amount of carry; Krunal Pandya goes for an upper cut; misses
on the shorter side as Krunal Pandya pulls it through square leg for a single
good length delivery around middle and leg; whipped across the line for a single through mid-wicket
pulled away! Scores level. A short ball by Jason Holder and Krunal Pandya has pulled this towards the deep square leg fence. Just a run away from victory are RCB

RCB win by 5 wickets with 7 balls to spare! A short ball by Jason Holder and Krunal Pandya hooks it towards fine leg and takes RCB over the line. The players have the customary handshakes between them. The RCB contingent is ecstatic as they hug each other near the dugout. Defending champions playing like Defending champions; says Eoin Morgan on air
